source: Uploaded SFL Hub JS: skills.js.descarga, nfts.js.descarga, buffsTemporarios.js.descarga. Rules mirror calcularBuff signal fields.

signal_meaning.quantidade.+A: add area yield divided by plots

rules.name: Green Thumb
rules.description: +5% more coins when selling crops (Seed Shop)

rules.name: Logger
rules.description: Uses half an axe per tree

rules.name: Chonky Scarecrow
rules.description: Basic Scarecrow AOE increased to 7x7; -10% basic crop growth time.

rules.name: Strong Roots
rules.description: 10% reduction in the time of Advanced Crops

rules.name: Golden Sunflower
rules.description: 1/700 chance of getting +0.35 gold when manually harvesting sunflowers

rules.name: Horror Mike
rules.description: Scary Mike AOE increases the size to 7x7 and +0.1 Crops (Medium Crops)

rules.name: Laurie's Gains
rules.description: Laurie Crow AOE increases the size to 7x7 and +0.1 Crops (Advanced Crops)

rules.name: Instant Growth
rules.description: Ability to make all Crops ready for harvest (1/72h)

rules.name: Acre Farm
rules.description: +1 Advanced crop yeild, -0.5 Basic and Medium crop yield

rules.name: Hectare Farm
rules.description: +1 Basic and Medium crop yield, -0.5 Advanced crop yield

rules.name: Fruity Heaven
rules.description: -10% in the cost of fruit seeds

rules.name: No Axe No Worries
rules.description: Cut fruit branches without axes, -1 wood from fruit branches

rules.description: -10% in the growth time of fruits

rules.name: Fruity Woody
rules.description: +1 wood from fruit branches and stems

rules.name: Pear Turbocharge
rules.description: Double the effect of Immortal Pear's

rules.name: Crime Fruit

rules.description: -25% Apple and Banana growth time, +10% growth time for all other fruit patch fruits

rules.name: Zesty Vibes
rules.description: +1 in the yield of Tomato and Lemon, -0.25 in the yield for all other fruits.

rules.name: Seedy Business
rules.description: -15% in the cost of greenhouse seeds.

rules.name: Rice and Shine
rules.description: -5% in the growth time of greenhouse products.

rules.name: Olive Express
rules.description: -10% in the growth time of olives.

rules.name: Rice Rocket
rules.description: -10% in the growth time of rice.

rules.name: Vine Velocity
rules.description: -10% in the growth time of grapes.

rules.name: Seeded Bounty
rules.description: +0.5 in GH production yield, +1 greenhouse seed to plant.

rules.name: Greenhouse Guru
rules.description: Make all GH crops that are growing ready for harvest (1/96h).

rules.name: Greasy Plants
rules.description: +1 in GH production yield, +100% in Oil consumption.

rules.name: Tree Charge
rules.description: -10% in the growth time of trees.

rules.name: Tough Tree
rules.description: 1/10 chance of x3 in wood yield.

rules.name: Money Tree
rules.description: 1% chance to find 200 Coins when cutting down trees.

rules.name: Tree Turnaround
rules.description: 15% chance for trees to grow instantly.

rules.name: Tree Blitz
rules.description: Make all trees grow instantly (once every 24 hours).

rules.name: Tap Prospector
rules.description: 1 hit on small minerals (stone, iron, gold)

rules.name: Forge-Ward Profits
rules.description: +20% revenue on deliveries to the Blacksmith.

rules.name: Rocky Favor
rules.description: +1 in stone yield, -0.5 in iron yield.

rules.name: Fire Kissed
rules.description: +1 in Crimstone yield on the 5th consecutive day.

rules.name: Ferrous Favor

rules.name: More Picks
rules.description: Increased stock: +70 Pickaxe, +20 Stone Pickaxe, +7 Iron Pickaxe.

rules.name: Crop Extension Module I
rules.description: Allow Rhubarb and Zucchini seeds to be used in the CM.

rules.description: -5% in CM growth time, +10% in Oil consumption.

rules.description: Triple the Oil tank capacity of the Crop Machine.

rules.name: Crop Extension Module III
rules.description: Allow Yam and Broccoli seeds to be used in the CM.

rules.description: -20% in CM growth time, +40% in Oil consumption.

rules.description: Make empty Oil wells refill instantly (1/96h).

rules.description: -5% feed required to feed all animals.

rules.description: +0.1 yield to feathers, leather, and merino wool.
